name: vscode-copilot-compressor
description: Owns a chat participant that compresses verbose requests into deterministic caveman-style prompts.

chatParticipants.name: compressor
chatParticipants.description: Compresses long developer prompts into deterministic caveman-style prompts.

commands.name: compress
commands.description: Compress and shape the current request before model usage

commands.name: raw
commands.description: Show the compressed prompt without caveman shaping

chatPromptFiles.description: Reusable caveman prompt file for manual chat workflows.

commands.title: Copilot Compressor: Compress Prompt From Input

engram.copilotCompressor.maxPromptChars.description: Character budget for compressed prompts before caveman shaping.

engram.copilotCompressor.includeHistory.description: Include prior user turns when building compressed prompt context.
